title: Fuertesimalva corniculata

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Fuertesimalva corniculata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, particularly beta-caryophyllene, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, Fuertesimalva corniculata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical applications like creams and ointments.
